#### Specifications

#### Why Buy ?

**Gyeon Q2M Ceramic Detailer is slick, glossy, SiO2 detailer, mixing together the best of spray sealants and quick detailers. Gyeon Q2M Ceramic Detailer is easy-to-use, being able to be used on wet and dry paint and even working as a drying aid. While Gyeon Q2M Ceramic Detailer can enhance a coated surface, it can be used on uncoated surfaces as well.**

#### How to Use

- Dampen a high-quality microfiber towel.

- Spray a moderate amount of product onto the surface.

- In a straight-line motion wipe away fingerprints and light dust.

- Wipe up any excess with a secondary dry towel.

**The slickest SiO2 Detailer!**

**Gyeon Q2M Ceramic Detailer is slick, glossy, SiO2 detailer, mixing together the best of spray sealants and quick detailers. Gyeon Q2M Ceramic Detailer is easy-to-use, being able to be used on wet and dry paint and even working as a drying aid. While Gyeon Q2M Ceramic Detailer can enhance a coated surface, it can be used on uncoated surfaces as well.**

Gyeon Q2M Ceramic Detailer is the ideal maintenance product for ceramic coated cars as it brings together the best properties and benefits from spray sealants and quick detailers.** Gyeon Q2M Ceramic Detailer is formulated to increase slickness and gloss and even add hydrophobic properties.** These hydrophobic properties will allow water to bead up and roll of the surface, rather than sticking around and creating spots of contamination.

What is great about Gyeon Q2M Ceramic Detailer is that it can be used in a variety of ways. It can be used not only on dry paint, but also wet paint. This not only saves time but also shows its true potential as a drying aid. **Although, Gyeon Q2M Ceramic Detailer is designed to enhance coated surfaces, it can still be used on uncoated surfaces.**

Easy-to-use, Gyeon Q2M Ceramic Detailer just takes a few simple steps to get enhanced gloss and slickness. Spray a liberal amount of product on a damp microfiber towel, then rub onto the surface before wiping away with a dry microfiber towel. **Gyeon Q2M Ceramic Detailer can last up to six weeks of durability.**

**DIRECTIONS:**

- Dampen a high-quality microfiber towel.

- Spray a moderate amount of product onto the surface.

- In a straight-line motion wipe away fingerprints and light dust.

- Wipe up any excess with a secondary dry towel.
